skills.name: Critical Element
skills.description: Increases elemental damage (fire, water, thunder, ice, dragon) when landing critical hits.

levels.description: Increases elemental damage (fire, water, thunder, ice, dragon) when landing critical hits.

skills.name: Frostcraft
skills.description: An aura of frost builds when your weapon is sheathed, raising attack. Wanes each melee hit or shot fired.

levels.description: An aura of frost builds when your weapon is sheathed, raising attack. Wanes each melee hit or shot fired.

skills.name: Divine Blessing
skills.description: Has a predetermined chance of reducing the damage you take.

levels.description: While active, reduces damage taken by 15%.
While active, reduces damage taken by 30%.
While active, reduces damage taken by 50%.
While active, reduces damage taken by 60%.
While active, reduces damage taken by 60%. Skill becomes easier to activate as well.

skills.name: Coalescence
skills.description: Temporarily enhances attacks after recovering from blights or abnormal status.

levels.description: While active, grants attack +12, element attack power +30, and status buildup +5%.
While active, grants attack +15, element attack power +60, and status buildup +10%.
While active, grants attack +18, element attack power +90, and status buildup +15%.

skills.name: Quick Sheath
skills.description: Speeds up weapon sheathing.

skills.name: Critical Draw
skills.description: Increases affinity when performing draw attacks.

skills.name: Quick Sheath
skills.description: Speeds up weapon sheathing.

skills.name: Flinch Free
skills.description: Prevents knockbacks and other reactions to small damage.

levels.description: Prevents knockbacks. Increases some Kinsect extract effects.
Prevents knockbacks. Tripping is reduced to a knockback. Increases some Kinsect extract effects.
Prevents knockbacks and tripping. Increases some Kinsect extract effects.

skills.name: Resuscitate
skills.description: Improves evasion and reduces stamina depletion when afflicted with abnormal status effects.

levels.description: While active, greatly improves evasion invulnerability time and reduces stamina depletion.

skills.name: Ice Attack
skills.description: Increases ice element attack power. (Elemental attack power has a maximum limit.)

skills.description: Increases affinity when performing draw attacks.

skills.name: Ice Attack
skills.description: Increases ice element attack power. (Elemental attack power has a maximum limit.)

skills.name: Recovery Up
skills.description: Increases the amount recovered when restoring health.

skills.name: Focus
skills.description: Increases the fill rate for weapons with gauges and the charge rate for weapons with charge attacks.

levels.description: Increases gauge fill rate by 5% and reduces charge times by 5%.
Increases gauge fill rate by 10% and reduces charge times by 10%.
Increases gauge fill rate by 20% and reduces charge times by 15%.
